items.title: Log temperature every 60 s
items.desc: Each sensor reports °C every minute; the logger writes one row per sensor per minute.

items.title: Chart room history
items.desc: Per-room view: last 24h, 7d, 30d, all-time. Touchable on a phone.

items.title: Anomaly alerts
items.desc: Push a notification when a room is >5 °C outside its 7-day band for more than 20 minutes.

items.title: CSV export
items.desc: Download all historical readings as CSV from the web UI. One file per room.
